claims.subject: Aiman Idris

claims.subject: Aiman Idris
claims.evidence: product feedback loop. i tell beatriz oliveira's team about a brasil-side issue or hannah park's team about an sea issue, i don't know what happens after. did it become a ticket? is it on the backlog? is it being prioritized? did anyone else flag the same thing?
claims.object_value: closed-loop product feedback visibility (ticket creation, backlog status, prioritization, duplicate flags)
